description: Survey start date and time
Survey end date and time
Date and time when response was recorded
Prolific participant ID (embedded data)
Experimental condition ID: 0=Flat, 1=Increasing (embedded data)
Experimental condition as factor: Flat or Increasing (computed from condid)
Replicate number (embedded data)
Whether participant met inclusion criteria: time_to_completion > 50 seconds (computed)
Agreement: Changing the features of posts had an impact on the engagement they received (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Agreement: Some features of posts resulted in stronger engagement than others (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Agreement: Overall, the features of posts mattered for how much engagement they received (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Agreement: The engagement received didn't seem affected by the features of the posts, reversed (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree, computed as -DV_4_R)
Agreement: The engagement received didn't seem affected by the features of the posts, original (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Index of illusory beliefs: Mean of DV_1, DV_2, DV_3, DV_4 plus 3 (computed)
Agreement: I managed to learn which features of posts (if any) had an impact on the engagement they received (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Agreement: I understood how the features of posts relate to their engagement (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Agreement: I know which features affected the engagement of posts, and in which direction (1=Strongly disagree to 5=Strongly agree)
Index of confidence in learning: Mean of CouldLearn_1, CouldLearn_2, CouldLearn_3 (computed)
Hook feature expected to generate STRONG engagement: 0=Question, 1=Cliffhanger, 2=Anecdote (renamed from 1_Hook)
Length feature expected to generate STRONG engagement: 0=Less than 400 characters, 1=400-1400 characters, 2=1400-2400 characters (renamed from 1_Length)
Tone feature expected to generate STRONG engagement: 0=First-Person, 1=Third-Person (renamed from 1_Tone)
Content feature expected to generate STRONG engagement: 0=Text, 1=Text + Picture, 2=Text + Poll (renamed from 1_Content)
Call to Action feature expected to generate STRONG engagement: 0='Like and Comment', 1=No Call to Action (renamed from 1_CTA)
Hook feature expected to generate WEAK engagement: 0=Question, 1=Cliffhanger, 2=Anecdote (renamed from 2_Hook)
Length feature expected to generate WEAK engagement: 0=Less than 400 characters, 1=400-1400 characters, 2=1400-2400 characters (renamed from 2_Length)
Tone feature expected to generate WEAK engagement: 0=First-Person, 1=Third-Person (renamed from 2_Tone)
Content feature expected to generate WEAK engagement: 0=Text, 1=Text + Picture, 2=Text + Poll (renamed from 2_Content)
Call to Action feature expected to generate WEAK engagement: 0='Like and Comment', 1=No Call to Action (renamed from 2_CTA)
